evidence: Runtime demonstrations via built dist against a fresh scratch substrate: bundled investigator compiled end-to-end (1025-char rendered task prompt); quality-analyzer compiled through its {% extends %} chain (548-char system prompt); investigator, phase-author, and quality-analyzer all compiled with ABSOLUTE, readable, JSON-parseable outputSchema paths (the exact prior ENOENT point at buildPhantomTool's readFileSync, replicated verbatim in the demo since jit-runtime imports the pi runtime); resolveDispatchModel returned null on the fresh substrate (no model-config, model-less spec); buildDispatchArgs carried --model when supplied and omitted it when absent; unknown-name negative unchanged. Full gates green at every commit (suite at 3305+ passing, 0 failing). Four adversarial probes across the arc: probe 2 found the outputSchema sibling hole (fixed via the package-root sibling probe); probe 3 found the sibling probe's local-tier shadowing vector (fixed via bundled-tier scoping) plus two NITs (README mechanism note added; dual phase-schema drift recorded in the gap closures); probe 4 found only a changelog-hygiene fold (applied and re-verified by direct read) — the loop converged.

criteria_results.criterion: Runtime demo via built dist on a fresh scratch substrate: bundled investigator compiles end-to-end and quality-analyzer compiles through its extends chain; unknown-name negative unchanged.
criteria_results.evidence: All observed live via dist evals (task prompt 1025 chars; extends-chain system prompt 548 chars; AgentNotFoundError with 3 searchPaths).

criteria_results.criterion: Model precedence observed: spec.model wins; by_role then default from the model-config block apply; with no block and no spec model, work-order buildDispatchArgs carries no --model flag and call-agent's throw names the model-config block.
criteria_results.evidence: Precedence unit cells green (spec/by_role/default/absent-block-null/no-match-null); --model presence/omission observed live via dist; call-agent's model-config-remedy message pinned in its updated test.

criteria_results.criterion: Substrate-local specs with templates beside the spec resolve byte-identically to before; block: sentinels and absolute refs untouched.
criteria_results.evidence: Existence-gate four-shape unit cells green; existing adjacent-fixture tests unmodified and green; probes 3 and 4 verified block:/absolute branches byte-identical from the diffs. The sibling probe is additionally scoped to the bundled tier (probe-3 fix), so local/user specs cannot shadow onto sibling dirs — pinned by real-collision negative cells.

criteria_results.criterion: phase-author.agent.yaml parses to a loader-resolvable ref on the workflow path.
criteria_results.evidence: Both of its refs repointed (template to the tier-relative name; outputSchema to the in-package schemas/phase.schema.json, semantically verified against the agent's declared output by probe 4); resolution from a fresh substrate observed live in the schema demo.

criteria_results.criterion: Docs corrected: no surface claims broader dispatchability than the runtime demo shows; README states the dispatch resolution tiers.
criteria_results.evidence: README gained the resolution-tiers section including the output-schema axis and the bundled-tier qualifier on the sibling clause; the overclaiming CHANGELOG bullet was rewritten and the superseded universal-probe sentence folded (probe-4 finding); citation-rot gate enforced zero substrate IDs in shipped markdown.

criteria_results.criterion: Full gates green; a FRESH adversarial re-probe of the complete branch diff finds nothing new; gap closures with honest closed_by.
criteria_results.evidence: Probe 4 (post-fix, fresh context) returned a single LOW changelog-hygiene finding and refuted nothing substantive; the fold was applied and re-verified by direct read. Gap closures follow in this same substrate commit.
